c74object.name: tap.fourpole~
c74object.description: The tap.fourpole~ object is a stereo 4-pole "Moog-style" ladder lowpass using the classic linear Stilson/Smith approximation — light on the CPU, with the familiar ladder character. For the virtual-analog model — nonlinear saturating stages, accurate tuning in the top octaves, self-oscillation, drive, multimode outputs, and oversampling — see tap.ladder~, this object's modern sibling.

attribute.name: q
attribute.description: Resonance (0-1). 0 is none; approaching 1 approaches self-oscillation.
